description:
Dive into an action-packed wilderness in PLANET WOW! 
Choose your favorite animal: Creep through the jungle like a chameleon, slither swiftly as a snake, or rule over rivers and swamps as a crocodile.
Will you be the hunter or the hunted? Only the strongest will survive!

• Play as powerful animals with cool special abilities
• Explore dangerous habitats - deserts, rainforests, swamps and more
• Dodge attacks and get stronger, level by level
• Collect exotic animals and unlock new powers
• Discover exciting facts and become a real expert on animals
